title: Get Column values in Payload

posts.author: duken (duken)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Team,

Need some on custom automation trigger, I have event based trigger When the column changes to the Started, custom automation send a post request to the url configured in my custom action.

I’m able to get the board id , item id but i need board name / item name is it possible to get in payload or should i include API to get those details.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
This forum is for the “monday dev” product, not the app developers forum which is here monday Apps & Developers - monday Community Forum

However, those fields are not able to be sent in the payload at this time. You will need to use the board and item IDs to fetch them with the API after receiving the payload.
